heroSection.welcome:
Welcome to iBank, Hanover Insurance's 
 content management application.

dashboard.demogrphicsInfo: The Employee Demographics chart provides a breakdown of how many employees belong to each role. Hover over a slice of the chart to see exact numbers!
dashboard.underwriterHelp: You are an UnderWriter, please give us time to give you help.
dashboard.businessAnalystHelp: You are an Business Analyst, please give us time to give you help.
dashboard.actuarialAnalystHelp: You are an Actuarial Analyst, please give us time to give you help.
dashboard.exlOperationsHelp: You are an EXL Operations, please give us time to give you help.
dashboard.businessOpTeamHelp: You are an Business Ops Team, please give us time to give you help.
dashboard.adminHelp: The Dashboard gives you a full organizational overview including employee demographics, recent activity, and content counts by role.
dashboard.dashboardInfo: The Dashboard gives you an overview of your organization.
dashboard.noPopularContent: No popular content data available yet.
dashboard.totalItemsInfo: This is the total amount of content accessible by
dashboard.editsInfo: This graphic shows the fluctuation in content hits by role.

dashboardRecentActivity.recentActivityInfo: The Recent Activity feed shows information about the four most recent actions taken across the application. This includes the user, the time, the date, and what they did. Go to the Activity page using the side bar for a longer time line of activity!

employeeManagement.helpInfo: The Employee Management page lets you view, add, edit, and delete employees. You can filter by position or department and search by name.
employeeManagement.confirmSaveUpdate: Are you sure you want to update
employeeManagement.confirmSaveCreate: Are you sure you want to create
employeeManagement.saveFailed: Save failed. Please verify required fields and try again.
employeeManagement.deleteFailed: Delete failed. Check server logs (backend route may be rejecting).

contentManagement.helpInfo: The Content page displays all documents and resources available for your role. You can search, filter, download, and open items directly.
contentManagement.confirmSubmit: Are you sure you want to submit this content?
contentManagement.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this content?
contentManagement.noPermissionDownload: You don't have access to download this file
contentManagement.unableToCheckoutEditing: Unable to checkout content for editing.
contentManagement.title: Title
contentManagement.author: Author
